name: prd-ux-audit
description: Bi-directional reconciliation of PRD requirements against UX Design System specifications. Detects conflicts, terminology drift, coverage gaps, undocumented UX additions, page composition mismatches, component-page mapping gaps, and navigation flow inconsistencies. Generates: (1) markdown reconciliation report, (2) interactive PRD↔UX matrix HTML with side-by-side comparison, and (3) optional delta tracking. Adaptive extraction — only analyzes structures each document defines. Runs without HTML mocks — pure document-level analysis.
